description_long: This bungalow features a low, single-story profile with a modern, angular design. The roof is a combination of flat and slightly sloped planes, with overhangs that provide shade to the windows and entryways. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of neutral tones, with sections of brown and gray, and a green base suggesting a landscaped yard. Large windows are visible on the longer sides, allowing for ample natural light inside. The structure appears to have a main entrance on the shorter side, with a possible garage or utility area adjacent to it. The overall design is compact, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, neutral-toned walls, and large windows, set on a green base.
description_view_0: Front and side of the bungalow with visible roof overhangs and a mix of brown and gray wall sections.
description_view_1: Narrow end of the bungalow, showing the main entrance and a possible garage or utility area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the long facade with large windows and a green base.
description_view_3: Rear view with a clear look at the flat roof and the back yard area.
